query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'blog_posts' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 25vRfUBwvHKUCo5.root --database Pa7E4RBX4UbpFBvKpz2nxk --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'blog_posts' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
id	int	NO	NULL
slug	varchar	NO	NULL
title	varchar	NO	NULL
excerpt	text	YES	NULL
content	longtext	YES	NULL
category	varchar	YES	NULL
tags	json	YES	NULL
status	enum	NO	draft
publishedAt	timestamp	YES	NULL
seoScore	int	NO	0
viewCount	int	NO	0
createdAt	timestamp	NO	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
updatedAt	timestamp	NO	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
